name: mycelium_bip_list
description: List build-in-public drafts. Returns pending drafts awaiting operator approval, approved drafts ready to post, and recently published posts.

status.description: Filter by draft status. Omit to get all.

trigger_event.description: Filter by the event that triggered the draft (e.g. task_completed)

limit.description: Max number of drafts to return

name: mycelium_bip_draft
description: Manually create a build-in-public draft. Use when you want to announce something specific (a launch, a milestone, a demo) that wasn't automatically triggered by an event.

title.description: Short headline for the post (what was shipped/achieved)

platforms.description: Platforms to post to when approved

name: mycelium_bip_approve
description: Approve a build-in-public draft for publishing. After approval, the content is ready to hand off to the social-posting plugin.

draft_id.description: ID of the draft to approve

approval_id.description: Optional: pre-obtained approval gate ID (from mycelium_request_approval with action_type=bip_post_publish)
